calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-04-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Liu, for petitioner Henry Gee.

The Court inquired regarding the lengthy delay in the filing of the disclaimers. Mr. Liu stated that all the beneficiaries live out of state. He said that petitioner Gee had been on title for the property, but when the property was refinanced his name was mistakenly omitted from the new deed. He stated that everyone had thought that the property was held in joint tenancy. He added that even though the disclaimers were executed in 2013 as a precaution, it was not thought that they would be needed, and therefore were not filed at that time. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not reported)
